title: Generated Compatibility Artifact Compression
goal: Resolve #281 by reducing generated compatibility artifacts that restate live operational state.
Advance #230 by making the visible adapter layer smaller while preserving weak-agent discoverability.
non_goals: Do not remove AGENTS.md or llms.txt.
Do not remove all weak-agent routing help.
Do not change canonical planning state ownership.
Do not close #230 unless the broader product-compression parent is materially complete.

intent.outcome: Generated helper artifacts stop acting like broad handbooks and shrink toward static routing tables over compact query surfaces.
intent.constraints: Preserve one obvious weak-agent path; keep changing truth in structured/queryable surfaces; avoid new prose surfaces.
intent.latitude: Choose whether to remove a mirror, compress generated markdown, or make a documented generated surface static when tests support it.
intent.escalation: Stop before broad startup redesign or package payload migration.

execution.next_step: Close #281 and continue from the next promoted roadmap lane.
execution.proof: Maintainer surfaces and focused tests pass while generated helper output is smaller and routing-only.

touched: packages/planning/bootstrap/ if source-payload sync is required
invariants: Generated helpers do not become doctrine owners or mirrors of changing live state.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: product-shape compression by removing or demoting visible residue

required_continuation.activation trigger: #230 remains open for broader product-shape compression after #281 is closed

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Weak-agent routing can stay available without broad generated helper-doc sprawl.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Any larger front-door or module packaging redesign and the broader #230 subtraction lane.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The CLI summary path compares against packaged payload renderers as well as the root checker, so generated-surface compression must keep package source, bootstrap payload, and root installed copies aligned.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: continue the active roadmap lane by lane with dogfooded planning authority
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: compress generated agent helper artifacts under #281
intent_interpretation.review guidance: reject broad docs expansion or removal of the only weak-agent routing path

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: preserve weak-agent discoverability; do not add new visible surfaces; keep canonical truth structured/queryable
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: which generated helper artifact to shrink or remove first and how to validate parity
delegated_judgment.escalate when: the slice requires deleting startup surfaces, broad payload migration, or changing install/adopt semantics

execution_bounds.allowed paths: generated helper source and outputs, generated-surface checks/tests, active planning state and execplan, package payload only if maintainer/source-payload checks require sync
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "agent_manifest or generated or quickstart or routing"; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/render_agent_docs.py .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/_render.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; git diff --check

context_budget.externalize before shift: update this execplan execution_run and closure fields
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace summary and gh issue view #281/#230
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: none unless generated surface decisions need prior rationale
context_budget.tiny resumability note: compress generated agent helper residue without removing weak-agent routing
context_budget.context-shift triggers: payload sync or generated-surface removal becomes broad

stop_conditions.stop when: #281 is shipped, dogfooded, committed, pushed, and closed or residual #230 work is routed
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: weak-agent routing would be removed without replacement
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: maintainer surfaces or generated-surface checks fail after compression

active_milestone.scope: generated helper surfaces and maintainer proof

immediate_next_action: Inspect generated helper renderer and tests.
Compress the broad generated helper output into smaller routing-only tables.
invariants: Changing state remains in compact/queryable surfaces.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "agent_manifest or generated or quickstart or routing"

uv run ruff check .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/render_agent_docs.py .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/_render.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py
completion_criteria: Generated compatibility artifacts that restate live state are removed or sharply reduced.
Remaining helper surfaces are static/routing-only and clearly non-authoritative.
Weak agents can still find the canonical compact startup/query surfaces.
Maintainer surface checks prove generated output is current.

execution_run.what happened: Compressed the generated quickstart and routing helper docs into short static routing adapters, updated manifest language so they no longer claim to mirror live state, and synced package/root renderers and checkers.
execution_run.scope touched: Generated helper renderers, generated helper docs, manifest mirrors, generated-surface checks, focused tests, and planning closeout.
execution_run.changed surfaces: .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/render_agent_docs.py; packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/_render.py; root and bootstrap AGENT_QUICKSTART/AGENT_ROUTING outputs; root/bootstrap agent manifests; planning-surface check copies; packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "agent_manifest or generated or quickstart or routing"; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check
execution_run.result for continuation: #281 is complete; #230 remains open in the roadmap for broader product-shape compression.
execution_run.next step: Close #281 and continue from the next roadmap lane.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changes stayed inside generated helper, package payload, manifest, check, test, and planning surfaces
finished_run_review.proof status: proved by focused tests, maintainer surfaces, summary, planning checker, and diff check
finished_run_review.intent served: yes for #281; generated prose helpers are now static routing adapters instead of manifest-expanded handbooks
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; work executed from active checked-in planning state and verified with package workflow commands
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; weak-agent discoverability remains through the same filenames and compact command pointers

proof_report.validation proof: focused tests passed; make maintainer-surfaces passed; agentic-workspace summary reported clean planning surfaces; scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py reported no warnings; git diff --check passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Generated quickstart/routing outputs are short static adapters; package and root render/check paths agree; no generated-surface drift remains.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Replace generated compatibility artefacts with minimal static routing tables so canonical workflows stay discoverable without creating extra mutable surfaces, while advancing the broader product-compression parent.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #281 itself is satisfied: generated compatibility docs no longer restate live manifest state and now remain static, state-free, non-authoritative routing tables. The broader product-compression parent remains open.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Favor work that removes, compresses, or backgrounds visible residue instead of adding new first-line surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer shrinking generated helpers over adding or enriching docs.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does the visible adapter layer become smaller without losing safe startup discovery?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #281 is complete, but #230 explicitly says not to close the broader product-compression direction after one cleanup.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Roadmap lane further-product-compression-on-repeated-pressure remains for #230; this archived plan carries #281 proof.
closure_check.reopen trigger: generated helpers again expand into broad manifest/state handbooks or #230 identifies another visible adapter layer that needs compression

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Generated helper docs were compressed into minimal static routing tables while preserving weak-agent discovery through the same filenames.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused generated-surface tests, maintainer surfaces, package summary, planning checker, and diff check all passed.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane further-product-compression-on-repeated-pressure for #230, with the next roadmap lane machine-readable-memory-state queued after it.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: The manifest and generated adapters now document the static/non-authoritative role; no separate memory note is needed.
execution_summary.resume from: machine-readable-memory-state after #281 closure, unless #230 is promoted again by a new product-compression signal

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted #281 as the remaining concrete product-compression slice under #230.
2026-04-26: Dogfooding found that the CLI summary path uses packaged payload render/check copies as well as root installed scripts; synced both before closeout.
